summary: Label-Designer Feature Testing Complete - All backend CRUD APIs (13 tests) and frontend UI functionality verified. Feature is fully functional.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: LabelDesigner.jsx correctly imports and uses react-grid-layout for drag & drop
All 10 element types implemented: QR-Code, Barcode, Asset-ID, Seriennummer, Gerätetyp, Hersteller, Modell, Eigener Text, Logo, Trennlinie
Backend properly excludes MongoDB _id from responses
Template duplication API endpoint available at POST /api/label-templates/{id}/duplicate
Default template handling works correctly with asset_type filtering
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_label_templates.py - Created new test file for Label Templates CRUD
seed_data_creation: Test templates created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Label-Designer feature is under Lagerverwaltung tab -> Label-Designer sub-tab. All CRUD operations work. Uses react-grid-layout for drag & drop canvas. Templates stored in MongoDB 'label_templates' collection.

frontend_ui.Element_palette: SUCCESS - All element types available (QR-Code, Barcode, Asset-ID, Seriennummer, Gerätetyp, Hersteller, Modell, Eigener Text, Logo, Trennlinie)
frontend_ui.Properties_panel: SUCCESS - Shows when element selected (Format, Wert anzeigen options)
frontend_ui.Save_dialog: SUCCESS - Opens with Name, Beschreibung, Asset-Typ, Als Standard festlegen fields
frontend_ui.Saved_templates_sidebar: SUCCESS - Templates listed with delete option
